columns.name: incident_date
columns.description: pd.to_datetime(Incident Date).

columns.name: lat_numeric
columns.description: pd.to_numeric(Latitude).

columns.name: lon_numeric
columns.description: pd.to_numeric(Longitude).

columns.name: sv_precrash_speed_mph
columns.description: pd.to_numeric(SV Precrash Speed (MPH)).

columns.name: has_multiple_reports
columns.description: True when the incident has more than one report.

columns.name: is_latest_of_multiple_report
columns.description: True for the canonical row of each incident: the most recent report of a multi-report group, and every single-report incident.

columns.name: Narrative - Same Incident ID
columns.description: All unique narratives for the incident, latest first, attached to the canonical row only.

columns.name: Operating Entity Clean
columns.description: Normalized 'Operating Entity' (lowercased, trimmed, legal suffixes dropped).

columns.name: Reporting Entity Clean
columns.description: Normalized 'Reporting Entity' (lowercased, trimmed, legal suffixes dropped).

columns.name: Investigating Agency Clean
columns.description: Normalized 'Investigating Agency' (lowercased, trimmed, legal suffixes dropped).

columns.name: State or Local Permit Clean
columns.description: Normalized 'State or Local Permit' (lowercased, trimmed, legal suffixes dropped).

columns.name: Make Clean
columns.description: Normalized 'Make' (lowercased, trimmed, legal suffixes dropped).

columns.name: Model Clean
columns.description: Normalized 'Model' (lowercased, trimmed, legal suffixes dropped).

columns.name: State Clean
columns.description: Normalized 'State' (lowercased, trimmed, legal suffixes dropped).

columns.name: master_entity
columns.description: Canonical entity display name (drops legal suffixes, collapses dotted acronyms, fuzzy-clusters near-duplicates).

columns.name: Make Model
columns.description: Normalized "<Make> | <Model>" combination string.

columns.name: automation_engaged_clean
columns.description: Engagement state {Engaged, Not Engaged, Unknown}.
columns.caveat: Semantic mismatch across versions: the early schema's 'Automation System Engaged?' encodes which system was involved (ADS/ADAS), while the later schema's 'Engagement Status' encodes the engagement state (Verified Engaged / Not Engaged). automation_engaged_clean folds both into an engagement state and is additive -- the raw columns are retained.

columns.name: automation_system_type
columns.description: Automation system type {ADS, ADAS, Unknown}.

columns.name: passengers_belted_clean
columns.description: Belt status {All Belted, No Passengers, Not Belted, Unknown}.

columns.name: weather_clear_clean
columns.description: Clear weather flag.

columns.name: weather_snow_clean
columns.description: Snow weather flag.

columns.name: weather_cloudy_clean
columns.description: Cloudy (incl. Partly Cloudy) flag.

columns.name: weather_fog_smoke_clean
columns.description: Fog/Smoke(/Haze) flag.

columns.name: weather_rain_clean
columns.description: Rain weather flag.

columns.name: weather_severe_wind_clean
columns.description: Severe wind flag.

columns.name: weather_unknown_clean
columns.description: Unknown weather flag.

columns.name: weather_dust_storm_clean
columns.description: Dust storm flag (later-only).

columns.name: weather_severe_hurricane_clean
columns.description: Severe hurricane flag (later-only).

columns.name: weather_structure_indoor_clean
columns.description: Structure/indoor flag (later-only).

columns.name: roadway_wet_surface_clean
columns.description: Wet surface condition flag.

columns.name: roadway_work_zone_clean
columns.description: Work zone flag.

columns.name: roadway_degraded_marking_clean
columns.description: Missing/degraded marking flag.

columns.name: roadway_traffic_incident_clean
columns.description: Traffic incident flag.

columns.name: lighting_clean
columns.description: Lighting category (early-schema only).
columns.caveat: Lighting is present only in the early schema; later-schema rows have no source column and receive NULL for lighting_clean.

columns.name: No Injury Reported
columns.description: Binary 0/1: no injury / property-damage-only.

columns.name: Injury Reported
columns.description: Binary 0/1: any injury severity reported (Minor/Moderate/Serious/Fatality).

columns.name: Multi Class Injury
columns.description: Ordinal 0-4: 0=none/unknown, 1=Minor, 2=Moderate, 3=Serious, 4=Fatality.

columns.name: Binary Airbag Deployed
columns.description: Binary 0/1: any airbag deployed (yes-substring across both schema variants).

columns.name: Binary Vehicle Towed
columns.description: Binary 0/1: any vehicle towed (yes-substring across both schema variants).

columns.name: SV Speed >= 10
columns.description: Binary 0/1: SV pre-crash speed >= 10 MPH.

columns.name: Potential Non-Trivial Accident
columns.description: Binary 0/1: OR of injury / airbag / towed / SV speed>=threshold / pedestrian crash.

columns.name: source_batch_ids
columns.description: Comma-separated list of ingest batches that fed the rows this treated build was derived from.

columns.name: built_at
columns.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when this treated table was built.
